value.name: incipit
value.summary: Template-driven CLI for transforming structured resume data into polished documents (PDF, DOCX, HTML, LaTeX, Markdown) with pluggable templates and AI-powered resume review and optimization.

value.name: mnemonist
value.summary: Local-first Rust CLI for AI agent memory, featuring cognitive verbs, markdown-based memories, semantic search with candle embeddings, and benchmarking on LongMemEval.

value.name: saige
value.summary: Unified Go SDK, CLI, and MCP server for streaming AI agents, knowledge graphs, and RAG pipelines, integrating multiple AI providers behind a single interface.

value.name: flappy-bird
value.summary: JavaFX-based Flappy Bird clone showcasing data-oriented design and automated native builds for cross-platform desktop development.

value.name: chess-cli
value.summary: Fully playable chess game with object-oriented Python design and command-line interface, ideal for learning game logic and exploring chess AI algorithms.

value.name: agentspec
value.summary: Universal agent skill and sub-agent manager with a terminal user interface, built in Rust.

value.name: teasr
value.summary: Rust-powered single binary tool for capturing showcase screenshots and GIFs from web apps, desktop, and terminal, requiring no runtime dependencies.

value.name: linear-gp
value.summary: Production-grade Rust framework for Linear Genetic Programming research, offering modular architecture, Q-Learning integration, and automated hyperparameter optimization.

value.name: lepus-classifier
value.summary: CNN research project investigating optimal image classification architectures for small datasets, highlighting data quantity as the key bottleneck for deep learning.

value.name: dotfiles
value.summary: Cross-platform dotfiles managed by Chezmoi, featuring one-command bootstrap for macOS and Linux with Neovim, Tmux, Zsh, and AI agent skills.

value.name: md-classifier
value.summary: Deep learning system combining transformers and CNNs to classify diseases from patient-described symptoms, achieving high recall through semantic embeddings.

value.name: duraturo
value.summary: Go utility for durable execution: wrap functions, run workers, and manage ledgers and queues over existing storage.

value.name: lazyspeak.nvim
value.summary: Voice-driven coding plugin for Neovim, enabling spoken intent to trigger edits directly in the editor.

value.name: generative-artifact-protocol
value.summary: Open standard for token-efficient artifact updates and streaming, featuring a Go apply engine and evaluation CLI.

value.name: github-insights
value.summary: AI-powered GitHub profile metrics tool with SVG visualizations, project classification, and README generation, available as CLI, npm package, and GitHub Action.

value.name: gymnasia
value.summary: Pure Rust implementation of OpenAI Gymnasium environments for reinforcement learning research.

value.name: urmzd.com
value.summary: Personal website, blog, and research portfolio built with Astro, React, and Three.js.

value.name: fsrc
value.summary: CLI, Rust crate, and GitHub Action for embedding source files into any text file using comment markers.

value.name: broadcast
value.summary: CLI tool for converting blog posts into platform-native content for X Articles and LinkedIn.

value.name: dispatch
value.summary: Beta control plane for agent execution nodes, scaling sandboxed agents with NGAC policy enforcement and workspace metrics.

value.name: rlgp-thesis
value.summary: BCS thesis project focused on Reinforced Linear Genetic Programming, written in TeX.

value.name: glassbox-lm
value.summary: Observable language models with readable hidden states, glassbox CLI for tracing and causal probing, and architectures aiming for full observability without performance loss.

value.name: lightning-kfold
value.summary: Stratified K-fold cross-validation with ensemble voting for PyTorch Lightning, designed for easy integration.

value.name: zoro
value.summary: Privacy-first AI research agent with a persistent knowledge graph, running all inference locally.

value.name: oag
value.summary: OpenAPI 3.x code generator for TypeScript, React/SWR, and FastAPI, using Jinja2 template packs and supporting SSE streaming.

value.name: sr
value.summary: Release engineering CLI in Rust, offering automated semantic versioning from conventional commits in a single static binary.

value.name: languide
value.summary: Scenario-based language guides built from markdown, generating PDFs with full Unicode and CJK support.

value.name: urmzd
value.summary: GitHub profile README with auto-generated metrics, project spotlights, and portfolio tables, regenerated by github-insights.

value.name: streamsafe
value.summary: Type-safe async pipeline framework for data processing in Rust.

value.name: zigbee-skill
value.summary: AI-native smart home skill enabling direct control of Zigbee devices without cloud or hub dependencies.

value.name: cypress-name-too-long-mre
value.summary: Minimal reproducible example for a Cypress issue, using JavaScript, HTML, and CSS.

value.name: barter-trader
value.summary: Android trading app built with Clean Architecture and MVVM, supporting peer-to-peer item exchanges with enterprise-grade mobile patterns.

preamble.value: I build local-first AI systems, streaming agent SDKs, and resume engines from scratch—mostly in Rust, Go, and TypeScript. Projects like mnemonist and incipit reflect my focus on modular tools, memory, and automation. Based in Austin.
